events.description: Economy deep-dive. 3 critical bugs the surface scan missed: pillage/caravan loot pay every frame for 2s per kill (60-120x scaling), wall enclosure income never deposits. Plus 7 lower-severity (vault interest 2x multiplied, miner load lost on smelter reassign, dead WallIncomeFromTech, etc.). Surface-scan verification: 9 of 10 MB-* claims REFUTED, only MB-5 (TradingPostSystem trader-approach offset) is a real bug. Continues the pattern from combat (0/11 confirmed) and movement (3/3 confirmed) — task-051's MB sweep is significantly smaller than reported.
